headline: Uber’s Bigger Delivery Hero Stake Raises Questions On Growth And Valuation
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has lifted its ownership stake in Delivery Hero to nearly 37% by acquiring shares from a major investor. The transaction removes an activist investor from Delivery Hero’s shareholder base and comes alongside active discussions about a potential full acquisition. These moves indicate Uber is now engaged in direct dealmaking that could significantly affect its international delivery presence and competitive position. headline: Uber’s CFO Just Said the Quiet Part Out Loud: AI’s Impact on Jobs Will Be Worse Than You Thought
summary: Artificial intelligence has become the biggest technology story since the internet. Companies are pouring hundreds of billions of dollars into AI infrastructure, software, and services, all chasing the same goal: higher productivity and bigger profits. But one lingering question has hung over the entire AI boom. Will the technology actually replace workers, or simply make ...
